title: HOMESmith 10 Pack Aluminium Foil Trays with Lids Containers Strong and Large Tin Foil Food Take Away Container Disposable Food Take Out Box with Lid|0.75 Litre |, Silver
features: · SUPER HIGH QUALITY - This aluminium foil trays is super thick not flimsy sturdy grip for easy handling and serving, Made from eco-friendly recyclable aluminium.
· SUPERIOR HEAT CONDUCTIVITY - Withstands temperatures of up to 260 Degree Celsius to help heat food evenly, and your food will not have the taste of aluminium.

· MULTI-PURPOSE - Perfect for catering party portions, broiling, baking, roasting pan, cakes, pies, casseroles, cooking, oven, and steam table picnic, BBQ, chafers, buffet, or takeaway. And much more, it is freezer safe containers to store away your delicious food

· CONVENIENTLY REUSABLE DISPOSABLE & RECYCLABLE - Aluminium take-away containers allow you to send guests home with leftovers without worrying about getting your aluminium tray back! Dispose of the foil packaging when you don't feel like cleaning, or easily hand wash and use them later as they are reusable, dispose of the foil when you don't feel like cleaning as they are recyclable.
· PACKAGE CONTAINS - 10 super strong aluminium containers including 10 aluminium colour Lids
